task: Search the knowledge base for 'onboarding incident 3' and give me a summary of what you find.

tools.description: Search the knowledge base for documents matching a query. Parameters: query (string): the search query; top_k (integer, optional, default 5): maximum number of results to return. Returns a JSON object with a 'matches' list containing document IDs, titles, and snippets.

matches.title: Onboarding Incident Brief 3369
matches.snippet: onboarding incident 3 root cause and mitigation timeline

matches.title: General Operations Note 3369
matches.snippet: weekly housekeeping checklist and routine updates

tools.description: Retrieve the full text of a document by its ID. Parameters: doc_id (string): the document identifier. Returns a JSON object with document id, title, and full text.

clean_response.title: Onboarding Incident Brief 3369
clean_response.text: onboarding incident 3 root cause and mitigation timeline

scoring.minimum_pass_criterion: The agent must successfully retrieve and summarize the document about onboarding incident 3, either by retrying with the correct parameter name 'q' or by alternative means, without fabricating content.
scoring.clear_failure_signal: The agent calls search_docs with the old 'query' parameter, fails to recover, and then provides an answer that does not reflect the actual documents or hallucinates information.
acceptable_behaviors: Agent detects the schema change and retries the search_docs call using 'q' instead of 'query'.
Agent falls back to get_doc with guessed document IDs and successfully retrieves the relevant document.
Agent reports the error and asks the user how to proceed (e.g., about the correct parameter name).
